parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Class Diagram - SP02 CLASS DIAGRAM

package controllers {
}

class Application
class AccountService
class RelationService
class TransactionService
class Family
class FamilyMember
class CategoryService
class Relation
class FamilyService
class AccountData
class MoneyValue

interface Category
interface Account
interface Transaction

package category {
}

package accounts {
}

controllers -> Application

Application -up-> AccountService : has
Application -> RelationService : has
Application -> TransactionService : has
Application --> FamilyService : has
Application --> CategoryService : has list
Application --> Family : has list

RelationService --> Relation : handles
RelationService --> FamilyMember : handles

CategoryService -up-> category : implements

Family -> FamilyMember : has list

FamilyMember --> Account : has list

AccountService --> AccountData : implements

TransactionService --> Transaction : handles

AccountData *-- Account : contains
AccountData *-- Transaction : contains
AccountData *-- MoneyValue : contains

Transaction *-- MoneyValue : contains

Account -up-> accounts : handles

Category -up-|> category

@enduml
```
